name: Green Zone Threshold (%)
helpText: Values at or above this are 'On Track' (green zone).

name: Yellow Zone Threshold (%)
helpText: Values above this but below green are 'Warning'. Below this is 'Critical'.

name: Y-Axis Minimum (%)
helpText: Lower bound of the Y axis.

name: Y-Axis Maximum (%)
helpText: Upper bound of the Y axis.

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for displayed values.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the dynamic tooltip. Leave empty for context-aware tooltip that adapts to data.

name: Line / Accent Color
helpText: Override the data line color. Leave empty for default cyan (#06F5FF).
